experiments.name: lightgbm_tfidf_svd_plus_hand_features
experiments.notes: LightGBM n_estimators=400, TF-IDF 6000 features -> SVD(150) + 25 hand features. Train time 51.5s.

experiments.name: histgb_tfidf_svd_plus_hand_features
experiments.notes: HistGradientBoosting max_iter=400, TF-IDF 6000 features -> SVD(100) + hand features. Train time 196.2s.

experiments.name: t2_svc_haiku_margin_sweep
experiments.notes: T2-equivalent LinearSVC with Haiku confidence threshold=0.55. Haiku predictions below threshold are promoted to best Sonnet.
